baselines.invalid_regime: single UE full JCLS clock-state estimation
baselines.masking_rule: plot as clockless/no-cooperation baseline or CRLB-free; do not report full-theta success
baselines.semantics: noncooperative TOA/downlink localization; should not estimate full cooperative network clocks

baselines.invalid_regime: rank-deficient one-epoch full theta treated as successful estimator
baselines.masking_rule: mark nonreportable if rank deficient or nonconverged
baselines.semantics: full model with clocks after reduced/preconditioned initialization

baselines.invalid_regime: refinement of failed local estimate reported as unconditional success
baselines.masking_rule: propagate upstream status and report covariance/information diagnostics
